error.invalid_code: Invalid code, please try again. If you get this error consistently, please make sure the clock of your Home Assistant system is accurate.

data_description.code: The six-digit code currently displayed in your authentication app.

confirm.description:
Before completing the setup of One-Time Password (OTP), confirm with a verification code. Scan the QR code with your authentication app. If you don't have one, we recommend either {auth_app1} or {auth_app2}.

After scanning the code, enter the six-digit code from your app to verify the setup. If you have problems scanning the QR code, do a manual setup with code **`{code}`**.
confirm.title: Verify One-Time Password (OTP)

data_description.name: The purpose of this sensor (for example, the name of the service or account for which the One-Time Password is used).
data_description.new_token: Generate a new secret key. You will be able to scan a QR code to import this token into your preferred authenticator app in the next step.
data_description.token: An existing secret key for import into Home Assistant.

user.description: Creates a sensor that generates One-Time Passwords (OTP) for two-factor authentication.
